## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q`
- [ ] Ruff check, if Python code changed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if public behavior changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused and scoped
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, private data, or local absolute paths are included
- [ ] README, CHANGELOG, or docs were updated if needed
